reservation.source_phrase: Once application is submitted our team will review the application, enroll your camper, and charge the $400 deposit.
reservation.source_block:
Step 2 Complete Camper Application Form
This online form will guide you through providing all the info needed. You will also be asked to review the financial portion of the application form. Once you are ready, you can submit the form.

Step 3 Application Review & Approval
Once application is submitted our team will review the application, enroll your camper, and charge the $400 deposit. If for some reason there is not availability then the parent will receive a call to review and discuss other options.

hours.source_phrase: Summer 2026 will start on Monday , June 22nd , and ends on Friday , August 14th .
hours.source_block:
What are the dates and hours for Summer Camp 2026?

Summer 2026 will start on Monday , June 22nd , and ends on Friday , August 14th .
The buses pull into the camp between 8:55 and 9:10 .
Round-up , which is our morning all-camp activity runs from 9:15 -to 9:30.
First group activity beginning at 9:30 .
The buses leave at 3:40 pm .
